news.title: Google I/O 2026: Every AI Drop Since Last Year
news.snippet: Gemini 3.1 Pro is the latest model, building on its reasoning abilities. Google doesn't do as many iterative models as OpenAI and Anthropic.

news.title: Anthropic Was Behind. Now It's the AI Boom's Front-Runner.
news.snippet: Siblings Daniela and Dario Amodei both worked at OpenAI before they co-founded Anthropic in 2021. Now Anthropic leads the AI race.

news.title: OpenAI and Anthropic kicked off a new arms race for cyber defense
news.snippet: Security teams already use new AI models to search for vulnerabilities while also worrying about attackers gaining access to models of similar strength.

news.title: OpenAI just lost its enterprise AI crown to Anthropic
news.snippet: Anthropic has steadily gained momentum with corporate customers over the past year. Then, in late 2025 and early 2026, adoption surged.

news.title: Anthropic now has more business customers than OpenAI, according to Ramp data
news.snippet: On OpenRouter's leaderboard, which samples a different portion of users, OpenAI loses some market share to Anthropic.

news.title: OpenAI and Anthropic Are Trying to Out-Freebie Each Other
news.snippet: Anthropic posted that it was increasing Claude Code's weekly limits by 50% until July 13.

news.title: Notable Researchers Join $4 Billion Effort to Build Self-Improving A.I.
news.snippet: Companies like Anthropic and OpenAI released new A.I. systems late last year that were particularly good at writing computer code.

news.title: Elon Musk, Sam Altman and the world's billionaires are terrified of the Google AI genius
news.snippet: Musk is back on his Hassabis hobbyhorse, worrying about DeepMind controlling superintelligence.

news.title: 3 charts to catch up on the OpenAI-Anthropic rivalry
news.snippet: Whoever goes public first at the higher multiple anchors how the entire frontier AI category gets priced.

news.title: AI Boom Creates Wealth Divide Among Tech Professionals
news.snippet: The AI boom is creating a widening wealth gap among tech professionals.

news.title: Where the former Google executive who backed OpenAI and Anthropic is investing now
news.snippet: An early backer of OpenAI and Anthropic is now betting on wellness.

news.title: Adaption aims big with AutoScientist, an AI tool that helps models train themselves
news.snippet: Adaption launches AutoScientist, an AI tool that helps models train themselves.
